page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g5ne.18xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 72 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 architecture, utilizing Intel Xeon 8163 processors operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. With a single thread per core configuration, the instance ensures predictable compute performance without hyperthreading resource sharing.

The instance is equipped with 288.0 GB of system memory, maintaining a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio of 4.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware, relying entirely on network-attached storage options. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 33 Gbps, facilitating efficient data transfer for distributed environments.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the dedicated core allocation and high network throughput make this instance suitable for workloads requiring consistent processing power and high-density memory configurations without the added cost of local NVMe drives. Recommended workloads include enterprise applications, web serving, distributed caching, and general-purpose database hosting.
